summary.summary: Enables text selection in SubmodulesView for both key and value Text elements so users can select/copy submodule names and SHA (diff:68fb2de97fe0; commit:87ffec437259; commit:90d2a7e7a62c; file:a88e84ba845d). Adds copy-to-clipboard support for app version/build/branch+SHA: imports UIKit, uses UIPasteboard, adds a showCopiedToast @State flag, a temporary toast overlay, and haptic feedback (diff:68fb2de97fe0; commit:e87265efd077; file:ba4ae3c45618). The copy interaction was changed from a long-press gesture to an explicit button and a copyVersionInfo helper was added (diff:68fb2de97fe0; commit:0b83acc8cf62). The changes were submitted via PR (pr:gordolio/Trio#1214; pr:nightscout/Trio#1214) and merged (commit:9e5aeabccd2d).
summary.userFacingImpact: Users can select text for submodule keys and values to copy SHAs (diff:68fb2de97fe0; commit:87ffec437259; commit:90d2a7e7a62c). Users can copy the full app version/build/branch+SHA to the clipboard via a new copy control; doing so triggers a brief toast confirmation and haptic feedback (diff:68fb2de97fe0; commit:e87265efd077; commit:0b83acc8cf62). Evidence in the provided changes documents the UI additions and behavior; no claims about effects outside the settings UI are made here and human review is not required based on the supplied sources (pr:gordolio/Trio#1214; pr:nightscout/Trio#1214).
